# partIDs

**Instance Property**

Returns a collection of part IDs reflecting the manifest of parts available in the document.

## Declaration

```swift
var partIDs: [Self.PartID] { get }
```

## Getting the part identifiers

- **MergeablePartsContainer.PartID**: The type for document layer IDs.
